NAME: Cebu Longitudinal Health and Nutrition Survey
DESCRIPTION: Long-standing community-based cohort in Metro Cebu with repeated anthropometric, dietary, and health measures from pregnancy/birth through adulthood; genetic and omics data used in developmental and metabolic trait studies.
MANUAL_CITATION: Adair, L. S., Popkin, B. M., VanDerslice, J., Akin, C., Guilkey, D., Black, R., ... & Hindin, M. (2011). Cohort Profile: The Cebu Longitudinal Health and Nutrition survey. International Journal of Epidemiology, 40(3), 619-630.
